core.label: D Fundamentals
core.description: Syntax, types, templates, and D's balance of high and low-level features.

topics.label: Installation & dub
topics.description: Install DMD/LDC and use dub package manager. D compiles to native code with optional GC.

topics.label: Variables & Types
topics.description: auto, immutable, const. Basic types, arrays, associative arrays, and slices.

topics.label: Functions & Templates
topics.description: Functions, UFCS, and D's powerful compile-time templates. Templates enable generic programming.

topics.label: Control Flow & Ranges
topics.description: if, switch, foreach, and D's range-based iteration. Ranges replace iterators.

topics.label: Classes & Structs
topics.description: Classes (reference, GC), structs (value, no GC). OOP with interfaces and mixins.

topics.label: Memory Management
topics.description: GC by default, @nogc for manual, and std.experimental.allocator. Choose your strategy.

topics.label: Compile-Time Features
topics.description: static if, mixin templates, CTFE (compile-time function evaluation). D's metaprogramming power.

topics.label: Unit Testing
topics.description: Built-in unittest blocks. Run with dmd -unittest or dub test.
